title: quirivelia frutescens
intro:
Quirivelia frutescens is a plant species belonging to the genus Quirivelia, however, I was unable to find any information on the Quirivelia frutescens plant. 

Instead, I found that Quisqualis frutescens, also known as Rangoon creeper, is a plant species with medicinal properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Quisqualis frutescens include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. 

Quisqualis frutescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, as a treatment for various health conditions.
